title: ExportFont property
description: Runs a file dialog from the Vision Guide GUI that allows you to export a font file.
notes:
Use the ExportFont property to export a font file to any location.  ImportFont can than be used to import the font into another Ocr object in any project.

See Also: ExportFont Property

ImportFont Property

Vision Objects: ExportFont Property

Ocr
see_also:
Design time only

Applies To

Vision Object: OCR
